Latest 8 Talks

  1. WebXR for Web Developers August 2024
    Doing VR and AR on the WWW requires a raft of APIs, libraries, languages, services, file formats, design metrics and approaches that web developers don't normally use.
  2. Join the Cool Kids — If You're Allowed! — The Web Share APIs March 2024
    The Web Share API and Web Share Target API allow your web app to send and receive content from native apps, like the big social networking apps.
  3. Gestures in WebXR — Barrier Mage September 2021
    Reliable gesture recognition enhances immersion.
  4. The ELK Stack January 2020
    Elasticsearch, Logstash & Kibana together enable powerful monitoring and data transformations.
  5. JavaScript Service Worker Design Patterns for Better UX September 2017
    Service Workers improve the user experience by insulating the webapp from the vagaries of the network.
  6. “Second Screen” apps with the Connect SDK September 2014
    Throwing content from a phone to a smart TV enables new interactions.
  7. Enyo: Yet Another Framework or The Next Step Beyond Dojo? February 2012
    Web apps on mobile require a new framework
  8. Loose-Schema Databases and Heterogeneous Data May 2011
    New databases are emerging, which embrace data in varying formats from varying sources.
